result.session_assessment: История и текущая тренировка отсутствуют, оценивается только стартовый план.

result.query: goal Goal.strength experience ExperienceLevel.intermediate equipment barbell plates rack bench

documents.title: Strength plan with barbell, rack and bench
documents.content: If the goal is strength and the user has a barbell, rack and bench, the initial plan should center around squat, bench press, deadlift or hinge variation, overhead press and rows. Use relatively low repetitions, stable technique and conservative weekly progression.

documents.title: Bodyweight and pull-up bar only
documents.content: If equipment is limited to bodyweight and a pull-up bar, recommendations should stay within pull-up variations, rows under a sturdy setup, push-ups, split squats, lunges, hinges without a barbell, planks and tempo-based progression. Do not prescribe barbell lifts.

documents.title: Hypertrophy recommendations with dumbbells and machines
documents.content: For hypertrophy with dumbbells and machines, build a balanced plan around presses, rows, split squats or leg press, hinges, lateral raises and arm work. Use moderate repetition ranges, controlled form and enough weekly volume without forcing failure on every set.
